'''pathaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:featherbush|featherbush]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-th-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:featherbush|featherbush]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pathaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæthæyæth|pæthæyæth]] || [[word:pæthæyæj|pæthæyæj]] || [[word:pæthæyæsh|pæthæyæsh]] || [[word:pæthæyæ|pæthæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pathathayath|pathathayath]] || [[word:pathathayaj|pathathayaj]] || [[word:pathathayash|pathathayash]] || [[word:pathathaya|pathathaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pathayath|pathayath]] || [[word:pathayaj|pathayaj]] || [[word:pathayash|pathayash]] || [[word:pathaya|pathaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pathafyath|pathafyath]] || [[word:pathafyaj|pathafyaj]] || [[word:pathafyash|pathafyash]] || [[word:pathafyaf|pathafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pathayatha|pathayatha]] || [[word:pathayaja|pathayaja]] || [[word:pathayasha|pathayasha]] || [[word:pathayaka|pathayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pathayath|pathayath]] || [[word:pathayaj|pathayaj]] || [[word:pathayash|pathayash]] || [[word:pathaya|pathaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pathayathal|pathayathal]] || [[word:pathayajal|pathayajal]] || [[word:pathayashal|pathayashal]] || [[word:pathayakal|pathayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pathayathatha|pathayathatha]] || [[word:pathayajaja|pathayajaja]] || [[word:pathayashasha|pathayashasha]] || [[word:pathayaka|pathayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pathayathan|pathayathan]] || [[word:pathayajan|pathayajan]] || [[word:pathayashan|pathayashan]] || [[word:pathayakan|pathayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pathayathaoro|pathayathaoro]] || [[word:pathayajaoro|pathayajaoro]] || [[word:pathayashaoro|pathayashaoro]] || [[word:pathayakaoro|pathayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
